label: scam
note: OCR-text form of representative scam screenshots (en + Hinglish). Each sample is what OCR would extract from a real screenshot. Used by scripts/benchmark-scamcheck.mjs and as canned inputs for /api/scam-intel/screenshot.

samples.ocrText: Dear Customer, your SBI account will be BLOCKED today due to incomplete KYC. Update immediately at http://sbi-kyc-verify.xyz or your account is suspended. For help call 9876543210. - SBI

India Post: Your parcel is held at customs clearance. A customs fee of Rs 25 is pending. Pay now to release your package: http://bit.ly/parcel-clear-pay. Failure to pay within 24 hours will return the parcel.

Congratulations! You have received a refund of Rs 4,999. To credit the amount, scan the QR code below or approve the collect request in your UPI app (PhonePe/Google Pay). Refund reference UPI REF 8821934.

URGENT: Your HDFC Bank PAN-Aadhaar KYC is incomplete and your account is suspended. Verify now at http://hdfc-kyc.top within 24 hours. Share the OTP sent to your phone to confirm. Do not ignore this message.
Dear customer, aapka SBI KYC update karo warna account block ho jayega. Abhi verify karo is link par: http://sbi-verify.top - SBI Bank
Aapko Rs 2000 ka refund mila hai. Refund ke liye OTP bhejo jo abhi aapke phone par aaya hai. Jaldi karo warna refund cancel ho jayega.
Your ICICI NetBanking will be deactivated. We detected unusual login. Re-activate your account immediately: http://icici-secure-login.xyz/verify Failure to act will permanently lock your account.
Congratulations! You are selected for a work from home job. Earn 5000 daily part-time. Pay Rs 199 registration to start. Message me on WhatsApp 9123456780 or visit bit.ly/wfh-join
